    26→class Candidate(Base):
    27→    """Candidate model - stores candidate profile information."""
    28→
    29→    __tablename__ = 'candidates'
    30→
    31→    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)

   132→def _set_wal_mode(dbapi_conn, connection_record):
   133→    """Enable WAL mode on every new SQLite connection.
   134→
   135→    WAL mode allows concurrent readers with a single writer,
   136→    suitable for 2-5 concurrent web users.
   137→    """
   138→    cursor = dbapi_conn.cursor()
   139→    cursor.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
   140→    cursor.close()

   143→class DatabaseManager:
   144→    """Database manager for initialization and session management."""
   145→
   146→    def __init__(self, db_path: Optional[str] = None):
   147→        """Initialize database manager."""
   148→        if db_path is None:
   149→            config = get_config()
   150→            db_path = config.get('data.database_path', 'data/maimai.db')
   151→
   152→        # Ensure data directory exists
   153→        db_file = Path(db_path)
   154→        db_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   155→
   156→        # Use QueuePool with WAL mode for concurrent read support (web service).
   157→        # check_same_thread=False is still needed for SQLite in multi-threaded context.
   158→        self.db_path = db_path
   159→        self.engine = create_engine(
   160→            f'sqlite:///{db_path}',
   161→            echo=False,
   162→            poolclass=QueuePool,
   163→            pool_size=5,
   164→            max_overflow=10,
   165→            connect_args={"check_same_thread": False},
   166→        )
   167→
   168→        # Enable WAL mode on every connection
   169→        event.listen(self.engine, "connect", _set_wal_mode)
   170→
   171→        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
   172→
   173→        # Auto-create tables and run migrations
   174→        self.init_db()
   175→
   176→        logger.info(f"Database initialized at: {db_path}")
   177→
   178→    def init_db(self):
   179→        """Create all tables and run pending migrations."""
   180→        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
   181→        logger.info("Database tables created successfully")
   182→
   183→        from src.models.migrations import run_migrations
   184→        run_migrations(self.engine)
   185→
   186→    @contextmanager
   187→    def session_scope(self):
   188→        """Provide a transactional scope with auto commit/rollback/close."""
   189→        session = self.Session()
   190→        try:
   191→            yield session
   192→            session.commit()
   193→        except Exception:
   194→            session.rollback()
   195→            raise
   196→        finally:
   197→            session.close()
   198→
   199→    def drop_all(self):
   200→        """Drop all tables (use with caution!)."""
   201→        Base.metadata.drop_all(self.engine)
   202→        logger.warning("All database tables dropped")
   203→
   204→
   205→# Global database manager instance
   206→_db_manager = None
   207→
   208→
   209→def get_db_manager() -> DatabaseManager:
   210→    """Get global database manager instance."""
   211→    global _db_manager
   212→    if _db_manager is None:
   213→        _db_manager = DatabaseManager()
   214→    return _db_manager
   215→

    70→async def search_all_keywords(
    71→    browser: BrowserManager,
    72→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
    73→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
    74→    location: Optional[str],
    75→    max_pages: int,
    76→    start_page: int = 1,
    77→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
    78→    """Iterate keywords, deduplicate, return combined results.
    79→
    80→    Args:
    81→        browser: BrowserManager instance
    82→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
    83→        company: Company filter strings
    84→        location: Location filter or None
    85→        max_pages: Pages per keyword
    86→        start_page: First page number
    87→
    88→    Returns:
    89→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
    90→    """
    91→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
    92→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
    93→
    94→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
    95→        console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Searching: {kw}[/bold blue]")
    96→        emit_progress("search_progress", keyword=kw, keyword_index=idx + 1,
    97→                       total_keywords=len(keywords), page=start_page, total_pages=max_pages)
    98→
    99→        candidates = await search_candidates(
   100→            keywords=kw,
   101→            company=company,
   102→            location=location,
   103→            pages=max_pages,
   104→            start_page=start_page,
   105→            browser=browser,
   106→        )
   107→
   108→        new_count = 0
   109→        for c in candidates:
   110→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   111→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   112→                all_candidates.append(c)
   113→                new_count += 1
   114→
   115→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
   116→        emit_progress("search_keyword_done", keyword=kw, found=len(candidates),
   117→                       new=new_count, total_so_far=len(all_candidates))
   118→
   119→    return all_candidates, seen_ids

   242→def generate_pipeline_report(
   243→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   244→    results: dict,
   245→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   246→    template: str,
   247→    mode: SearchMode,
   248→) -> str:
   249→    """Generate an Excel report for a pipeline run.
   250→
   251→    Args:
   252→        candidates: All candidates from search
   253→        results: Send results dict (total/sent/failed/skipped/rate_limited/details)
   254→        keywords: Search keywords used
   255→        template: Template name used
   256→        mode: Search mode (search_center or enterprise)
   257→
   258→    Returns:
   259→        Path to the generated report file
   260→    """
   261→    from openpyxl import Workbook
   262→    from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
   263→    from loguru import logger
   264→
   265→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   266→    config = get_config()
   267→    report_dir = Path(config.get('data.report_dir', 'data/reports'))
   268→    report_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   269→    report_path = report_dir / f"pipeline_{timestamp.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.xlsx"
   270→
   271→    wb = Workbook()
   272→
   273→    # --- Sheet 1: Overview ---
   274→    ws_overview = wb.active
   275→    ws_overview.title = "概览"
   276→
   277→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   278→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   279→    border = Border(
   280→        left=Side(style="thin"), right=Side(style="thin"),
   281→        top=Side(style="thin"), bottom=Side(style="thin"),
   282→    )
   283→
   284→    overview_rows = [
   285→        ("执行时间", timestamp.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")),
   286→        ("搜索关键词", ", ".join(keywords)),
   287→        ("消息模板", template),
   288→        ("搜索模式", mode.value),
   289→        ("搜索结果数", results["total"]),
   290→        ("发送总数", results["sent"] + results["failed"]),
   291→        ("成功", results["sent"]),
   292→        ("失败", results["failed"]),
   293→        ("跳过(已沟通)", results["skipped"]),
   294→        ("限流", results["rate_limited"]),
   295→    ]
   296→
   297→    for r_idx, (key, value) in enumerate(overview_rows, 1):
   298→        cell_key = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=1, value=key)
   299→        cell_val = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=2, value=value)
   300→        cell_key.font = Font(bold=True)
   301→        for cell in (cell_key, cell_val):
   302→            cell.border = border
   303→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center")
   304→
   305→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["A"].width = 18
   306→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["B"].width = 40
   307→
   308→    # --- Sheet 2: Candidate Details ---
   309→    ws_details = wb.create_sheet(title="候选人详情")
   310→
   311→    columns = ["序号", "姓名", "职位", "公司", "地区", "脉脉ID", "沟通状态", "失败原因"]
   312→    for c_idx, col_name in enumerate(columns, 1):
   313→        cell = ws_details.cell(row=1, column=c_idx, value=col_name)
   314→        cell.font = header_font
   315→        cell.fill = header_fill
   316→        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center")
   317→        cell.border = border
   318→
   319→    # Build a lookup from maimai_id -> detail
   320→    details_by_id: Dict[str, dict] = {}
   321→    for detail in results.get("details", []):
   322→        details_by_id[detail["maimai_id"]] = detail
   323→
   324→    status_map = {
   325→        "sent": "已发送",
   326→        "failed": "失败",
   327→        "skipped": "跳过",
   328→        "rate_limited": "限流",
   329→    }
   330→
   331→    for r_idx, c in enumerate(candidates, 1):
   332→        detail = details_by_id.get(c.maimai_id, {})
   333→        raw_status = detail.get("status", "not_attempted")
   334→        status_label = status_map.get(raw_status, "未处理")
   335→        reason = detail.get("reason", "")
   336→
   337→        row_data = [r_idx, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or "", c.maimai_id, status_label, reason]
   338→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row_data, 1):
   339→            cell = ws_details.cell(row=r_idx + 1, column=c_idx, value=value)
   340→            cell.border = border
   341→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   342→
   343→    detail_widths = {"A": 6, "B": 12, "C": 25, "D": 20, "E": 12, "F": 18, "G": 12, "H": 30}
   344→    for col, width in detail_widths.items():
   345→        ws_details.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   346→
   347→    ws_details.freeze_panes = "A2"
   348→    ws_details.auto_filter.ref = ws_details.dimensions
   349→
   350→    wb.save(str(report_path))
   351→    logger.info(f"Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}")
   352→    console.print(f"[green]Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}[/green]")
   353→    return str(report_path)

   409→    skip_messaged: bool,
   410→    interactive: bool = False,
   411→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   412→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   413→) -> None:
   414→    """Pipeline: search all pages first, then send messages.
   415→
   416→    Saves a checkpoint after search completes so that message sending
   417→    can be resumed if interrupted.
   418→    """
   419→    checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   420→
   421→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   422→        # Keep enterprise tab open for inline messaging (unless dry_run)
   423→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   424→            browser, keywords, company, max_pages,
   425→            keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   426→        )
   427→    else:
   428→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords(
   429→            browser, keywords, company, location, max_pages,
   430→        )
   431→
   432→    if not all_candidates:
   433→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   434→        emit_progress("completed", result={"total": 0, "message": "No candidates found"})
   435→        return
   436→
   437→    # Save checkpoint after search (batch_pages=0 marks non-batch mode)
   438→    _save_checkpoint(
   439→        checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   440→        max_pages, 0, skip_messaged, interactive,
   441→        max_pages, [], seen_ids, {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0},
   442→        mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   443→    )
   444→
   445→    display_candidates_table(all_candidates, "Pipeline Results")
   446→
   447→    # Emit search complete with candidate list for web confirmation
   448→    emit_progress("search_complete", candidates=[
   449→        {"maimai_id": c.maimai_id, "name": c.name, "title": c.title,
   450→         "company": c.company, "location": c.location or ""}
   451→        for c in all_candidates
   452→    ])
   453→
   454→    if dry_run:
   455→        console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] {len(all_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   456→        checkpoint.delete()
   457→        emit_progress("completed", result={"total": len(all_candidates), "dry_run": True})
   458→        return
   459→
   460→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   461→        results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   462→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   463→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   464→        )
   465→    else:
   466→        results = await send_batch(
   467→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged, interactive,
   468→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   469→        )
   470→
   471→    # Fetch final quota for summary display
   472→    quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   473→    display_send_results(results, quota=quota)
   474→    generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, results, keywords, template, mode)
   475→
   476→    emit_progress("completed", result=results)
   477→
   478→    # Clean up checkpoint on successful completion
   479→    checkpoint.delete()
   480→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   481→
   482→    # Auto backup database after successful pipeline
   483→    _auto_backup_database()

   486→async def run_pipeline_batched(
   487→    browser: BrowserManager,
   488→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   489→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   490→    location: Optional[str],
   491→    max_pages: int,
   492→    batch_pages: int,
   493→    template: str,
   494→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   495→    dry_run: bool,
   496→    skip_messaged: bool,
   497→    interactive: bool = False,
   498→    resume_ckpt=None,
   499→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   500→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   501→) -> None:
   502→    """Batched pipeline: search N pages, send messages, repeat."""
   503→    # Restore state from checkpoint or start fresh
   504→    if resume_ckpt:
   505→        # On resume, only treat sent_ids as truly "seen" (skip-worthy).
   506→        # Candidates that were found but not sent should be retried.
   507→        sent_ids = list(resume_ckpt.sent_ids)
   508→        seen_ids = set(sent_ids)  # only skip candidates already successfully sent
   509→        total_results = resume_ckpt.total_results or {
   510→            'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0,
   511→        }
   512→        start_from_page = resume_ckpt.completed_pages + 1
   513→        console.print(f"[cyan]Resuming from page {start_from_page} (sent: {len(sent_ids)}, retrying unsent)[/cyan]")
   514→        checkpoint = resume_ckpt
   515→    else:
   516→        seen_ids = set()
   517→        sent_ids = []
   518→        total_results = {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0}
   519→        start_from_page = 1
   520→        checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   521→
   522→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   523→    all_details: List[dict] = []
   524→    batch_num = 0
   525→    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   526→
   527→    batch_start = start_from_page
   528→    while batch_start <= max_pages:
   529→        batch_page_count = min(batch_pages, max_pages - batch_start + 1)
   530→        batch_num += 1
   531→        batch_end = batch_start + batch_page_count - 1
   532→
   533→        console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Batch {batch_num}: Pages {batch_start}-{batch_end} ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   534→
   535→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   536→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   537→                browser, keywords, company, batch_page_count,
   538→                keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   539→            )
   540→        else:
   541→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   542→                browser, keywords, company, location, batch_page_count, start_page=batch_start,
   543→            )
   544→        # Filter out globally seen IDs
   545→        batch_candidates = [c for c in batch_candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
   546→        seen_ids.update(c.maimai_id for c in batch_candidates)
   547→        all_candidates.extend(batch_candidates)
   548→
   549→        if not batch_candidates:
   550→            consecutive_empty_batches += 1
   551→            console.print(f"[yellow]No new candidates in batch {batch_num}.[/yellow]")
   552→
   553→            if consecutive_empty_batches >= 2:
   554→                console.print("[red]Multiple consecutive empty batches detected. Verifying login status...[/red]")
   555→                if not await check_login_status(browser.page):
   556→                    console.print("[red]Session expired! Clearing session and re-authenticating...[/red]")
   557→                    session_manager = get_session_manager()
   558→                    await session_manager.clear()
   559→                    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   560→                    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   561→                    console.print("[green]Re-authenticated. Retrying current batch...[/green]")
   562→                    batch_num -= 1
   563→                    continue
   564→                else:
   565→                    console.print("[yellow]Session appears valid. Possibly no more results for these keywords.[/yellow]")
   566→
   567→            _save_checkpoint(
   568→                checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   569→                max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   570→                batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   571→                mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   572→            )
   573→            batch_start += batch_pages
   574→            continue
   575→        else:
   576→            consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   577→
   578→        display_candidates_table(batch_candidates, f"Batch {batch_num} Results")
   579→
   580→        if dry_run:
   581→            console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] Batch {batch_num}: {len(batch_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   582→            _save_checkpoint(
   583→                checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   584→                max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   585→                batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   586→                mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   587→            )
   588→            batch_start += batch_pages
   589→            continue
   590→
   591→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   592→            results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   593→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   594→                skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   595→            )
   596→        else:
   597→            results = await send_batch(
   598→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged, interactive,
   599→                skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   600→            )
   601→        batch_quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   602→        display_send_results(results, title=f"Batch {batch_num} Send Results", quota=batch_quota)
   603→
   604→        all_details.extend(results.get('details', []))
   605→        for detail in results.get('details', []):
   606→            if detail.get('status') == 'sent':
   607→                sent_ids.append(detail['maimai_id'])
   608→
   609→        for key in total_results:
   610→            total_results[key] += results[key]
   611→
   612→        _save_checkpoint(
   613→            checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   614→            max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   615→            batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   616→            mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   617→        )
   618→        console.print(f"[dim]Checkpoint saved (page {batch_end})[/dim]")
   619→
   620→        batch_start += batch_pages
   621→
   622→    # Final summary
   623→    console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Pipeline Complete ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   624→    console.print(f"Total unique candidates found: {len(seen_ids)}")
   625→    if not dry_run and total_results['total'] > 0:
   626→        final_quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   627→        display_send_results(total_results, title="Overall Send Results", quota=final_quota)
   628→        total_results_with_details = {**total_results, 'details': all_details}
   629→        generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, total_results_with_details, keywords, template, mode)
   630→
   631→    checkpoint.delete()
   632→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   633→
   634→    # Auto backup database after successful batched pipeline
   635→    _auto_backup_database()
   636→
   637→
   638→def _save_checkpoint(
   639→    checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   640→    max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   641→    completed_pages, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   642→    mode: str = "search_center",
   643→    dry_run: bool = False,
   644→) -> None:
   645→    """Save pipeline checkpoint (DRY helper)."""
   646→    checkpoint.save(
   647→        keywords=keywords, template=template, variables=variables,
   648→        company=company, location=location, max_pages=max_pages,
   649→        batch_pages=batch_pages, skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   650→        interactive=interactive, completed_pages=completed_pages,
   651→        sent_ids=sent_ids, seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
   652→        total_results=total_results, mode=mode, dry_run=dry_run,
   653→    )
   654→

   288→@click.pass_context
   289→def pipeline(ctx, keywords, template, var, company, location, max_pages, mode, dry_run, skip_messaged, batch_pages, interactive, resume, yes, preview, auto_filter):
   290→    """
   291→    Search candidates and batch send messages in one command.
   292→
   293→    Combines multi-keyword search with batch messaging:
   294→    search → preview → confirm → send.
   295→
   296→    Use --mode enterprise for the enterprise recruitment path with inline messaging.
   297→
   298→    Use --batch-pages to interleave search and messaging every N pages.
   299→    Example: -p 10 --batch-pages 2 searches pages 1-2, sends messages,
   300→    then pages 3-4, sends messages, etc.
   301→
   302→    Use --resume to continue from the last interrupted pipeline run.
   303→
   304→    Examples:\n
   305→        maimai pipeline -k "前端工程师" -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=张三" -p 2\n
   306→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -k "后端" -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=张三" --dry-run\n
   307→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting -p 10 --batch-pages 2\n
   308→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting -p 1 -i\n
   309→        maimai pipeline -k "研发" -t greeting -m enterprise -p 3\n
   310→        maimai pipeline --resume
   311→    """
   312→    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   313→    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   314→    from src.services.pipeline import run_pipeline_default, run_pipeline_batched, SearchMode
   315→
   316→    # Handle resume mode
   317→    if resume:
   318→        ckpt = CheckpointManager.load_latest()
   319→        if ckpt is None:
   320→            console.print("[red]No checkpoint found to resume from.[/red]")
   321→            return
   322→
   323→        from rich.panel import Panel
   324→        console.print(Panel(ckpt.summary, title="Resuming Pipeline", border_style="cyan"))
   325→
   326→        p = ckpt.params
   327→        keywords = tuple(p.get('keywords', []))
   328→        template = p.get('template', template)
   329→        variables = p.get('variables', {})
   330→        company = tuple(p.get('company', []))
   331→        location = p.get('location', location)
   332→        max_pages = p.get('max_pages', max_pages)
   333→        batch_pages = p.get('batch_pages', batch_pages)
   334→        skip_messaged = p.get('skip_messaged', skip_messaged)
   335→        interactive = p.get('interactive', interactive)
   336→        mode = p.get('mode', mode)
   337→        dry_run = p.get('dry_run', dry_run)
   338→    else:
   339→        ckpt = None
   340→        variables = _parse_variables(var)
   341→
   342→    if not keywords or not template:
   343→        console.print("[red]--keywords (-k) and --template (-t) are required (or use --resume).[/red]")
   344→        return
   345→
   346→    # Resolve SearchMode enum
   347→    search_mode = SearchMode(mode)
   348→
   349→    if search_mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE and batch_pages > 0:
   350→        console.print("[yellow]Note: --batch-pages with enterprise mode uses infinite scroll; "
   351→                      "each batch opens a fresh enterprise search. Deduplication prevents re-messaging.[/yellow]")
   352→
   353→    _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx)
   354→
   355→    async def _pipeline():
   356→        from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
   357→        from src.services.pipeline import search_all_keywords, search_all_keywords_enterprise
   358→        from src.modules.message import render_template
   359→        from src.utils.config import get_config
   360→        from rich.panel import Panel
   361→
   362→        reset_delay_session()
   363→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   364→        try:
   365→            await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   366→
   367→            # Preview mode: search and show first 3 messages
   368→            if preview:
   369→                console.print("[cyan]Preview 模式: 搜索并预览前 3 条消息[/cyan]\n")
   370→
   371→                if mode == 'enterprise':
   372→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   373→                        browser, keywords, company, min(max_pages, 1)
   374→                    )
   375→                else:
   376→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   377→                        browser, keywords, company, location, min(max_pages, 1)
   378→                    )
   379→
   380→                if not all_candidates:
   381→                    console.print("[yellow]没有找到候选人[/yellow]")
   382→                    return
   383→
   384→                # Apply auto-filter
   385→                if auto_filter:
   386→                    from src.utils.filters import filter_candidates
   387→                    before_count = len(all_candidates)
   388→                    candidates_dict = [
   389→                        {
   390→                            'maimai_id': c.maimai_id,
   391→                            'name': c.name,
   392→                            'title': c.title,
   393→                            'company': c.company,
   394→                        }
   395→                        for c in all_candidates
   396→                    ]
   397→                    filtered_dict = filter_candidates(candidates_dict, auto_filter=True)
   398→                    filtered_ids = {c['maimai_id'] for c in filtered_dict}
   399→                    all_candidates = [c for c in all_candidates if c.maimai_id in filtered_ids]
   400→
   401→                    if len(all_candidates) < before_count:
   402→                        console.print(f"[dim]自动过滤: {before_count} → {len(all_candidates)} 位候选人[/dim]\n")
   403→
   404→                    if not all_candidates:
   405→                        console.print("[yellow]过滤后没有符合条件的候选人[/yellow]")
   406→                        return
   407→
   408→                # Load template
   409→                config = get_config()
   410→                tmpl = config.get_template(template)
   411→
   412→                # Show first 3 candidates with rendered messages
   413→                preview_count = min(3, len(all_candidates))
   414→                console.print(f"[bold]预览前 {preview_count} 位候选人的消息:[/bold]\n")
   415→
   416→                for i, c in enumerate(all_candidates[:preview_count], 1):
   417→                    msg_vars = {
   418→                        **variables,
   419→                        'name': c.name,
   420→                        'company': c.company,
   421→                        'position': c.title,
   422→                    }
   423→                    try:
   424→                        rendered = render_template(tmpl['content'], msg_vars)
   425→                        console.print(f"[bold cyan]#{i} {c.name}[/bold cyan] - {c.title} @ {c.company}")
   426→                        console.print(Panel(rendered, title=f"消息预览", border_style="green"))
   427→                        console.print()
   428→                    except Exception as e:
   429→                        console.print(f"[red]渲染失败: {e}[/red]\n")
   430→
   431→                console.print(f"[dim]总共找到 {len(all_candidates)} 位候选人[/dim]")
   432→                console.print("[yellow]Preview 完成，使用 --dry-run 搜索所有页面但不发送[/yellow]")
   433→                return
   434→
   435→            if batch_pages > 0:
   436→                await run_pipeline_batched(
   437→                    browser, keywords, company, location,
   438→                    max_pages, batch_pages, template, variables,
   439→                    dry_run, skip_messaged, interactive, ckpt,
   440→                    mode=search_mode,
   441→                    skip_confirmation=yes,
   442→                )
   443→            else:
   444→                await run_pipeline_default(
   445→                    browser, keywords, company, location,
   446→                    max_pages, template, variables,
   447→                    dry_run, skip_messaged, interactive,
   448→                    mode=search_mode,
   449→                    skip_confirmation=yes,
   450→                )
   451→        finally:
   452→            await browser.close()
   453→
   454→    run_async(_pipeline())

   744→@cli.command()
   745→def duplicates():
   746→    """
   747→    查找重复的候选人.
   748→
   749→    按姓名+公司分组，显示重复项。
   750→
   751→    Example:
   752→        maimai duplicates
   753→    """
   754→    from src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
   755→    from sqlalchemy import func
   756→    from rich.table import Table
   757→
   758→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   759→
   760→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   761→        # 按 name + company 分组，找出重复项
   762→        duplicates_query = session.query(
   763→            Candidate.name,
   764→            Candidate.company,
   765→            func.count(Candidate.id).label('count')
   766→        ).group_by(Candidate.name, Candidate.company)\
   767→         .having(func.count(Candidate.id) > 1)\
   768→         .all()
   769→
   770→        if not duplicates_query:
   771→            console.print("[green]✓ 没有发现重复的候选人[/green]")
   772→            return
   773→
   774→        console.print(f"\n[yellow]发现 {len(duplicates_query)} 组重复候选人:[/yellow]\n")

   778→        table.add_column("公司", style="yellow")
   779→        table.add_column("重复次数", style="red", justify="right")
   780→
   781→        for name, company, count in duplicates_query:
   782→            table.add_row(name, company or '[dim]未知[/dim]', f"×{count}")
   783→
   784→        console.print(table)

   789→def _parse_variables(var: tuple) -> dict:
   790→    """Parse key=value variable pairs from CLI option."""
   791→    variables = {}
   792→    for v in var:
   793→        if '=' in v:
   794→            key, value = v.split('=', 1)
   795→            variables[key.strip()] = value.strip()
   796→        else:
   797→            console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: ignoring malformed variable '{v}' (expected key=value format)[/yellow]")
   798→    return variables
   799→
   800→

   807→        sys.exit(1)
   808→    except KeyboardInterrupt:

   810→        sys.exit(0)
   811→    except Exception as e:
   812→        console.print(f"[red]Unexpected error: {e}[/red]")
   813→        sys.exit(1)
   814→
   815→
   816→if __name__ == '__main__':

1→"""Pipeline endpoint — search + message orchestration with confirmation flow."""
     2→
     3→import asyncio
     4→
     5→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException
     6→
     7→from src.web.deps import get_queue, get_broadcaster
     8→from src.web.schemas import PipelineRequest, PipelineConfirmRequest, TaskResponse
     9→from src.web.task_queue import BrowserTask, TaskPriority, TaskStatus, TaskQueue
    10→from src.web.progress import Broadcaster, set_progress_callback, reset_progress_callback, emit_progress
    11→
    12→router = APIRouter()
    13→
    14→
    15→@router.post("/pipeline", response_model=TaskResponse)
    16→async def run_pipeline(
    17→    req: PipelineRequest,
    18→    queue: TaskQueue = Depends(get_queue),
    19→    broadcaster: Broadcaster = Depends(get_broadcaster),
    20→):
    21→    """Submit a pipeline task (search + optional message sending).
    22→
    23→    If auto_send=False (default), the task will pause after search and emit
    24→    an 'awaiting_confirmation' event via WebSocket. Use POST /api/pipeline/{task_id}/confirm
    25→    to resume with selected candidates.
    26→    """
    27→
    28→    async def _run():
    29→        from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
    30→        from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
    31→        from src.services.pipeline import (
    32→            search_all_keywords, search_all_keywords_enterprise,
    33→            send_batch, send_batch_enterprise,
    34→            SearchMode, _candidates_to_dicts,
    35→        )
    36→
    37→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    38→        await browser.start()
    39→        await ensure_logged_in(browser)
    40→
    41→        mode = SearchMode(req.mode)
    42→
    43→        # --- Search phase ---
    44→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
    45→            all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
    46→                browser, tuple(req.keywords), tuple(req.company), req.pages,
    47→                keep_last_tab_open=not req.dry_run,
    48→            )
    49→        else:
    50→            all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords(
    51→                browser, tuple(req.keywords), tuple(req.company),
    52→                req.location, req.pages,
    53→            )
    54→
    55→        if not all_candidates:
    56→            return {"total": 0, "message": "No candidates found"}
    57→
    58→        candidate_dicts = [
    59→            {"maimai_id": c.maimai_id, "name": c.name, "title": c.title,
    60→             "company": c.company, "location": c.location or "", "profile_url": c.profile_url or ""}
    61→            for c in all_candidates
    62→        ]
    63→
    64→        if req.dry_run:
    65→            return {"total": len(all_candidates), "candidates": candidate_dicts, "dry_run": True}
    66→
    67→        # --- Confirmation phase ---
    68→        if not req.auto_send:
    69→            # Emit awaiting_confirmation and wait for user input
    70→            emit_progress("awaiting_confirmation", candidates=candidate_dicts)
    71→
    72→            # Get the current task from queue and set up confirmation event
    73→            current = queue.current_task
    74→            if current:
    75→                # Create confirmation event if not exists (should be initialized in BrowserTask)
    76→                if current.confirmation_event is None:
    77→                    current.confirmation_event = asyncio.Event()
    78→                current.status = TaskStatus.AWAITING_CONFIRMATION
    79→
    80→                # Wait up to 10 minutes for confirmation
    81→                try:
    82→                    await asyncio.wait_for(current.confirmation_event.wait(), timeout=600)
    83→                except asyncio.TimeoutError:
    84→                    emit_progress("failed", error="Confirmation timed out after 10 minutes")
    85→                    return {"error": "Confirmation timed out"}
    86→
    87→                # Filter candidates to only those confirmed
    88→                # Check for None to avoid AttributeError if confirmation timed out or failed
    89→                if current.confirmation_data is None:
    90→                    emit_progress("failed", error="No confirmation data received")
    91→                    return {"error": "Confirmation data missing"}
    92→
    93→                confirmed_ids = set(current.confirmation_data.get("maimai_ids", []))
    94→                all_candidates = [c for c in all_candidates if c.maimai_id in confirmed_ids]
    95→
    96→                if not all_candidates:
    97→                    return {"total": 0, "message": "No candidates selected"}
    98→
    99→                current.status = TaskStatus.RUNNING
   100→
   101→        emit_progress("sending_started", total=len(all_candidates))
   102→
   103→        # --- Send phase ---
   104→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   105→            results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   106→                all_candidates, req.template, req.variables,
   107→                list(req.keywords), browser, req.skip_messaged,
   108→                skip_confirmation=True,
   109→            )
   110→        else:
   111→            results = await send_batch(
   112→                all_candidates, req.template, req.variables,
   113→                list(req.keywords), browser, req.skip_messaged,
   114→                skip_confirmation=True,
   115→            )
   116→
   117→        return results
   118→
   119→    task = BrowserTask(
   120→        name=f"pipeline:{','.join(req.keywords)}",
   121→        coroutine_factory=None,  # set below
   122→        priority=TaskPriority.LOW,
   123→    )
   124→
   125→    cb = broadcaster.make_progress_callback(task.task_id)
   126→
   127→    async def _wrapped():
   128→        token = set_progress_callback(cb)
   129→        try:
   130→            return await _run()
   131→        finally:
   132→            reset_progress_callback(token)
   133→
   134→    task.coroutine_factory = _wrapped
   135→    await queue.submit(task)
   136→
   137→    return TaskResponse(task_id=task.task_id, status="queued", position=queue.queue_size)
   138→
   139→
   140→@router.post("/pipeline/{task_id}/confirm")
   141→async def confirm_pipeline(
   142→    task_id: str,
   143→    req: PipelineConfirmRequest,
   144→    queue: TaskQueue = Depends(get_queue),
   145→):
   146→    """Confirm candidate selection for a waiting pipeline task."""
   147→    task = queue.get_task(task_id)
   148→    if not task:
   149→        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
   150→
   151→    if task.status != TaskStatus.AWAITING_CONFIRMATION:
   152→        raise HTTPException(
   153→            status_code=400,
   154→            detail=f"Task is not awaiting confirmation (status: {task.status})",
   155→        )
   156→
   157→    # Check confirmation_event is initialized
   158→    if task.confirmation_event is None:
   159→        raise HTTPException(
   160→            status_code=500,
   161→            detail="Confirmation event not initialized for this task",
   162→        )
   163→
   164→    # Use lock to prevent race conditions from concurrent confirm requests
   165→    async with task._confirmation_lock:
   166→        task.confirmation_data = {"maimai_ids": req.maimai_ids}
   167→        task.confirmation_event.set()
   168→
   169→    return {"status": "confirmed", "selected": len(req.maimai_ids)}
   170→

1→"""Export endpoint — generates file and returns download."""
     2→
     3→import io
     4→from datetime import datetime
     5→
     6→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
     7→from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
     8→
     9→from src.models.database import Candidate, DatabaseManager
    10→from src.web.deps import get_db
    11→from src.web.schemas import ExportRequest
    12→
    13→router = APIRouter()
    14→
    15→
    16→@router.post("/export")
    17→async def export_candidates(
    18→    req: ExportRequest,
    19→    db: DatabaseManager = Depends(get_db),
    20→):
    21→    """Export candidates to Excel or CSV format."""
    22→    with db.session_scope() as session:
    23→        query = session.query(Candidate)
    24→        if req.search_keyword:
    25→            pattern = f"%{req.search_keyword}%"
    26→            query = query.filter(
    27→                (Candidate.source_search.ilike(pattern)) |
    28→                (Candidate.name.ilike(pattern))
    29→            )
    30→        candidates = query.order_by(Candidate.last_updated.desc()).all()
    31→
    32→        # Build data rows (while session is open)
    33→        rows = []
    34→        for c in candidates:
    35→            rows.append({
    36→                "maimai_id": c.maimai_id,
    37→                "name": c.name or "",
    38→                "title": c.title or "",
    39→                "company": c.company or "",
    40→                "location": c.location or "",
    41→                "profile_url": c.profile_url or "",
    42→                "source_search": c.source_search or "",
    43→                "first_seen": c.first_seen.isoformat() if c.first_seen else "",
    44→            })
    45→
    46→    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    47→
    48→    if req.format == "csv":
    49→        import csv
    50→        output = io.StringIO()
    51→        if rows:
    52→            writer = csv.DictWriter(output, fieldnames=rows[0].keys())
    53→            writer.writeheader()
    54→            writer.writerows(rows)
    55→        content = output.getvalue().encode("utf-8-sig")
    56→        return StreamingResponse(
    57→            io.BytesIO(content),
    58→            media_type="text/csv",
    59→            headers={"Content-Disposition": f"attachment; filename=candidates_{timestamp}.csv"},
    60→        )
    61→    else:
    62→        from openpyxl import Workbook
    63→        from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment
    64→
    65→        wb = Workbook()
    66→        ws = wb.active
    67→        ws.title = "Candidates"
    68→
    69→        headers = ["脉脉ID", "姓名", "职位", "公司", "地区", "Profile URL", "搜索来源", "首次发现"]
    70→        header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
    71→        header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
    72→
    73→        for col, h in enumerate(headers, 1):
    74→            cell = ws.cell(row=1, column=col, value=h)
    75→            cell.font = header_font
    76→            cell.fill = header_fill
    77→            cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center")
    78→
    79→        for row_idx, row in enumerate(rows, 2):
    80→            for col_idx, key in enumerate(row.keys(), 1):
    81→                ws.cell(row=row_idx, column=col_idx, value=row[key])
    82→
    83→        widths = [15, 12, 25, 20, 10, 40, 20, 20]
    84→        for i, w in enumerate(widths):
    85→            ws.column_dimensions[chr(65 + i)].width = w
    86→
    87→        ws.freeze_panes = "A2"
    88→
    89→        buffer = io.BytesIO()
    90→        wb.save(buffer)
    91→        buffer.seek(0)
    92→
    93→        return StreamingResponse(
    94→            buffer,
    95→            media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
    96→            headers={"Content-Disposition": f"attachment; filename=candidates_{timestamp}.xlsx"},
    97→        )
    98→

1→"""Candidates and messages listing endpoints — direct DB query, no browser needed."""
     2→
     3→from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Query
     4→from sqlalchemy import func
     5→
     6→from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, DatabaseManager
     7→from src.web.deps import get_db
     8→from src.web.schemas import CandidateDetailResponse, MessageHistoryResponse
     9→
    10→router = APIRouter()
    11→
    12→
    13→@router.get("/candidates")
    14→async def list_candidates(
    15→    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    16→    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    17→    search: str = Query(None),
    18→    db: DatabaseManager = Depends(get_db),
    19→):
    20→    """List candidates with pagination and optional search filter."""
    21→    with db.session_scope() as session:
    22→        query = session.query(Candidate)
    23→
    24→        if search:
    25→            pattern = f"%{search}%"
    26→            query = query.filter(
    27→                (Candidate.name.ilike(pattern)) |
    28→                (Candidate.company.ilike(pattern)) |
    29→                (Candidate.title.ilike(pattern))
    30→            )
    31→
    32→        total = query.count()
    33→        candidates = (
    34→            query.order_by(Candidate.last_updated.desc())
    35→            .offset((page - 1) * page_size)
    36→            .limit(page_size)
    37→            .all()
    38→        )
    39→
    40→        # Get message counts in batch
    41→        c_ids = [c.maimai_id for c in candidates]
    42→        msg_counts = {}
    43→        if c_ids:
    44→            rows = (
    45→                session.query(Message.candidate_maimai_id, func.count(Message.id))
    46→                .filter(Message.candidate_maimai_id.in_(c_ids))
    47→                .group_by(Message.candidate_maimai_id)
    48→                .all()
    49→            )
    50→            msg_counts = dict(rows)
    51→
    52→        items = []
    53→        for c in candidates:
    54→            items.append(CandidateDetailResponse(
    55→                id=c.id,
    56→                maimai_id=c.maimai_id,
    57→                name=c.name,
    58→                title=c.title,
    59→                company=c.company,
    60→                location=c.location,
    61→                profile_url=c.profile_url,
    62→                first_seen=c.first_seen.isoformat() if c.first_seen else None,
    63→                last_updated=c.last_updated.isoformat() if c.last_updated else None,
    64→                source_search=c.source_search,
    65→                message_count=msg_counts.get(c.maimai_id, 0),
    66→            ))
    67→
    68→    return {
    69→        "items": items,
    70→        "total": total,
    71→        "page": page,
    72→        "page_size": page_size,
    73→        "total_pages": (total + page_size - 1) // page_size,
    74→    }
    75→
    76→
    77→@router.get("/messages")
    78→async def list_messages(
    79→    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    80→    page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    81→    db: DatabaseManager = Depends(get_db),
    82→):
    83→    """List message history with pagination."""
    84→    with db.session_scope() as session:
    85→        total = session.query(Message).count()
    86→        messages = (
    87→            session.query(Message)
    88→            .order_by(Message.created_at.desc())
    89→            .offset((page - 1) * page_size)
    90→            .limit(page_size)
    91→            .all()
    92→        )
    93→
    94→        # Batch fetch candidate names
    95→        c_ids = list({m.candidate_maimai_id for m in messages if m.candidate_maimai_id})
    96→        name_map = {}
    97→        if c_ids:
    98→            rows = (
    99→                session.query(Candidate.maimai_id, Candidate.name)
   100→                .filter(Candidate.maimai_id.in_(c_ids))
   101→                .all()
   102→            )
   103→            name_map = dict(rows)
   104→
   105→        items = []
   106→        for m in messages:
   107→            items.append(MessageHistoryResponse(
   108→                id=m.id,
   109→                candidate_maimai_id=m.candidate_maimai_id or "",
   110→                candidate_name=name_map.get(m.candidate_maimai_id),
   111→                template_name=m.template_name,
   112→                content=m.content,
   113→                status=m.status or "unknown",
   114→                sent_at=m.sent_at.isoformat() if m.sent_at else None,
   115→                created_at=m.created_at.isoformat() if m.created_at else None,
   116→            ))
   117→
   118→    return {
   119→        "items": items,
   120→        "total": total,
   121→        "page": page,
   122→        "page_size": page_size,
   123→        "total_pages": (total + page_size - 1) // page_size,
   124→    }

1→"""Export module for exporting candidate data.
     2→
     3→Supports Excel (.xlsx) and CSV formats with optional
     4→message history inclusion.
     5→"""

    79→def _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages: bool) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    80→    """
    81→    Get candidate data from database.
    82→
    83→    Args:
    84→        db_manager: Database manager instance
    85→        include_messages: Whether to include message history
    86→
    87→    Returns:
    88→        List of candidate dictionaries
    89→    """
    90→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    91→        candidates = session.query(Candidate).all()
    92→
    93→        # Batch pre-fetch all messages grouped by candidate to avoid N+1 queries
    94→        messages_by_candidate = {}
    95→        if include_messages and candidates:
    96→            all_maimai_ids = [c.maimai_id for c in candidates]
    97→            all_messages = session.query(Message).filter(
    98→                Message.candidate_maimai_id.in_(all_maimai_ids)
    99→            ).order_by(Message.created_at.desc()).all()
   100→
   101→            for msg in all_messages:
   102→                messages_by_candidate.setdefault(msg.candidate_maimai_id, []).append(msg)
   103→
   104→        data = []
   105→        for candidate in candidates:
   106→            record = {
   107→                'maimai_id': candidate.maimai_id,
   108→                'name': candidate.name,
   109→                'title': candidate.title,
   110→                'company': candidate.company,
   111→                'location': candidate.location,
   112→                'profile_url': candidate.profile_url,
   113→                'first_seen': candidate.first_seen,
   114→                'last_updated': candidate.last_updated,
   115→                'source_search': candidate.source_search,
   116→            }
   117→
   118→            # Flatten education
   119→            education = candidate.education or []
   120→            if education:
   121→                latest_edu = education[0]
   122→                record['latest_education'] = _format_education(latest_edu)
   123→            else:
   124→                record['latest_education'] = ''
   125→
   126→            # Flatten work experience
   127→            work_exp = candidate.work_experience or []
   128→            if work_exp:
   129→                latest_work = work_exp[0]
   130→                record['latest_experience'] = _format_work_experience(latest_work)
   131→            else:
   132→                record['latest_experience'] = ''
   133→
   134→            # Format skills
   135→            skills = candidate.skills or []
   136→            record['skills'] = ', '.join(skills) if skills else ''
   137→
   138→            # Get message info from pre-fetched data
   139→            if include_messages:
   140→                messages = messages_by_candidate.get(candidate.maimai_id, [])
   141→                record['message_count'] = len(messages)
   142→
   143→                if messages:
   144→                    latest_msg = messages[0]
   145→                    record['last_message_status'] = latest_msg.status
   146→                    record['last_message_date'] = latest_msg.sent_at or latest_msg.created_at
   147→                    record['last_message_template'] = latest_msg.template_name
   148→                else:
   149→                    record['last_message_status'] = ''
   150→                    record['last_message_date'] = None
   151→                    record['last_message_template'] = ''
   152→
   153→            data.append(record)
   154→
   155→        return data
   156→
   157→
   158→def _format_education(edu: Dict) -> str:
   159→    """Format education entry as string."""
   160→    parts = []
   161→    if edu.get('school'):
   162→        parts.append(edu['school'])
   163→    if edu.get('degree'):
   164→        parts.append(edu['degree'])
   165→    if edu.get('major'):
   166→        parts.append(edu['major'])
   167→    return ' - '.join(parts) if parts else ''
   168→
   169→
   170→def _format_work_experience(work: Dict) -> str:
   171→    """Format work experience entry as string."""
   172→    parts = []
   173→    if work.get('title'):
   174→        parts.append(work['title'])
   175→    if work.get('company'):
   176→        parts.append(f"@ {work['company']}")
   177→    return ' '.join(parts) if parts else ''
   178→
   179→
   180→def _create_dataframe(data: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> pd.DataFrame:
   181→    """
   182→    Create pandas DataFrame from candidate data.
   183→
   184→    Args:
   185→        data: List of candidate dictionaries
   186→
   187→    Returns:
   188→        pandas DataFrame
   189→    """
   190→    # Define column order
   191→    columns = [
   192→        'maimai_id',
   193→        'name',
   194→        'title',
   195→        'company',
   196→        'location',
   197→        'latest_education',
   198→        'latest_experience',
   199→        'skills',
   200→        'profile_url',
   201→        'source_search',
   202→        'first_seen',
   203→        'last_updated',
   204→    ]
   205→
   206→    # Add message columns if present
   207→    if data and 'message_count' in data[0]:
   208→        columns.extend([
   209→            'message_count',
   210→            'last_message_status',
   211→            'last_message_date',
   212→            'last_message_template',
   213→        ])
   214→
   215→    # Create DataFrame
   216→    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
   217→
   218→    # Reorder columns (only include existing columns)
   219→    existing_columns = [c for c in columns if c in df.columns]
   220→    df = df[existing_columns]
   221→
   222→    # Format datetime columns, replacing NaT with empty string
   223→    datetime_columns = ['first_seen', 'last_updated', 'last_message_date']
   224→    for col in datetime_columns:
   225→        if col in df.columns:
   226→            dt_series = pd.to_datetime(df[col])
   227→            df[col] = dt_series.dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M').fillna('')
   228→
   229→    return df
   230→
   231→
   232→def _export_to_excel(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
   233→    """
   234→    Export DataFrame to Excel with formatting.
   235→
   236→    Args:
   237→        df: pandas DataFrame
   238→        output_path: Output file path
   239→    """
   240→    # Create workbook
   241→    wb = Workbook()
   242→    ws = wb.active
   243→    ws.title = "Candidates"
   244→
   245→    # Define styles
   246→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   247→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   248→    header_alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   249→
   250→    border = Border(
   251→        left=Side(style='thin'),
   252→        right=Side(style='thin'),
   253→        top=Side(style='thin'),
   254→        bottom=Side(style='thin')
   255→    )
   256→
   257→    # Write data
   258→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(dataframe_to_rows(df, index=False, header=True), 1):
   259→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row, 1):
   260→            cell = ws.cell(row=r_idx, column=c_idx, value=value)
   261→            cell.border = border
   262→
   263→            if r_idx == 1:
   264→                # Header row
   265→                cell.font = header_font
   266→                cell.fill = header_fill
   267→                cell.alignment = header_alignment
   268→            else:
   269→                # Data rows
   270→                cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   271→
   272→    # Set column widths
   273→    column_widths = {
   274→        'A': 15,  # maimai_id
   275→        'B': 12,  # name
   276→        'C': 25,  # title
   277→        'D': 20,  # company
   278→        'E': 12,  # location
   279→        'F': 30,  # latest_education
   280→        'G': 30,  # latest_experience
   281→        'H': 40,  # skills
   282→        'I': 40,  # profile_url
   283→        'J': 20,  # source_search
   284→        'K': 18,  # first_seen
   285→        'L': 18,  # last_updated
   286→        'M': 12,  # message_count
   287→        'N': 15,  # last_message_status
   288→        'O': 18,  # last_message_date
   289→        'P': 15,  # last_message_template
   290→    }
   291→
   292→    for col, width in column_widths.items():
   293→        ws.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   294→
   295→    # Freeze first row
   296→    ws.freeze_panes = 'A2'
   297→
   298→    # Add auto-filter
   299→    ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions
   300→
   301→    # Save workbook
   302→    wb.save(output_path)
   303→    logger.info(f"Excel file saved to: {output_path}")
   304→
   305→
   306→def _export_to_csv(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
   307→    """
   308→    Export DataFrame to CSV.
   309→
   310→    Args:
   311→        df: pandas DataFrame
   312→        output_path: Output file path
   313→    """
   314→    df.to_csv(output_path, index=False, encoding='utf-8-sig')
   315→    logger.info(f"CSV file saved to: {output_path}")
   316→

    45→def _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    46→    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.

    49→    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    50→    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    51→    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    52→    """
    53→    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    54→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    55→    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    56→    # Only use query parameter IDs — these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    57→    for key in ('dstu', 'u2', 'egid'):
    58→        if key in params:
    59→            return params[key][0]
    60→    return None

    97→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    98→            db_candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
    99→            profile_url = db_candidate.profile_url if db_candidate else None

   103→
   104→    # Try extracting user_id directly from profile URL

   113→
   114→    # Navigate to profile page, then try to extract user_id from resulting URL
   115→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: navigating to profile {profile_url}")
   116→    await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')

   119→    current_url = page.url

   129→    # Fallback: click chat button on profile page

   145→            discovered_selectors.skip_chat_button = result.skip_chat_button
   146→            discovered_selectors.is_populated = True

1→"""WebSocket progress broadcaster and contextvars-based callback injection.
     2→
     3→This module provides two things:
     4→1. A Broadcaster that manages WebSocket connections and pushes events
     5→2. A contextvars-based emit_progress() function that existing modules can call
     6→   without knowing about WebSocket — in CLI mode, the context var is None
     7→   and calls are silently ignored.
     8→"""
     9→
    10→import asyncio
    11→import contextvars
    12→import json
    13→from typing import Any, Callable, Coroutine, Dict, Optional, Set
    14→
    15→from fastapi import WebSocket
    16→from loguru import logger
    17→
    18→
    19→# Context variable for injecting progress callback into existing modules.
    20→# In CLI mode this is None; in Web mode it's set before calling pipeline/message.
    21→_progress_ctx: contextvars.ContextVar[Optional[Callable]] = contextvars.ContextVar(
    22→    '_progress_ctx', default=None
    23→)
    24→
    25→
    26→def set_progress_callback(callback: Optional[Callable]) -> contextvars.Token:
    27→    """Set the progress callback for the current async context."""
    28→    return _progress_ctx.set(callback)
    29→
    30→
    31→def reset_progress_callback(token: contextvars.Token) -> None:
    32→    """Reset the progress callback to its previous value using the token."""
    33→    _progress_ctx.reset(token)
    34→
    35→
    36→def emit_progress(event: str, **data: Any) -> None:
    37→    """Emit a progress event if a callback is registered.
    38→
    39→    Safe to call from anywhere — does nothing in CLI mode.
    40→    In web mode, schedules the async callback as a fire-and-forget task.
    41→    """
    42→    cb = _progress_ctx.get()
    43→    if cb is not None:
    44→        try:
    45→            loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    46→            task = loop.create_task(cb(event, data))
    47→            # Add done callback to handle exceptions and prevent "Task exception was never retrieved"
    48→            task.add_done_callback(_handle_task_exception)
    49→        except RuntimeError:
    50→            pass  # No running event loop (shouldn't happen in web mode)
    51→
    52→
    53→def _handle_task_exception(task: asyncio.Task) -> None:
    54→    """Handle exceptions from fire-and-forget emit_progress tasks."""
    55→    try:
    56→        task.result()  # Retrieve result to surface any exceptions
    57→    except asyncio.CancelledError:
    58→        pass  # Task was cancelled, this is expected
    59→    except Exception as e:
    60→        logger.error(f"Error in progress callback: {e}")
    61→
    62→
    63→class Broadcaster:
    64→    """Manages WebSocket connections and broadcasts task events.
    65→
    66→    Supports two types of subscriptions:
    67→    - Task-specific: /ws/task/{task_id} — receives events for one task
    68→    - Global: /ws/global — receives all task events
    69→    """
    70→
    71→    def __init__(self):
    72→        # task_id -> set of WebSocket connections
    73→        self._task_subs: Dict[str, Set[WebSocket]] = {}
    74→        # Global subscribers
    75→        self._global_subs: Set[WebSocket] = set()
    76→
    77→    async def subscribe_task(self, task_id: str, ws: WebSocket) -> None:
    78→        """Subscribe a WebSocket to events for a specific task."""
    79→        if task_id not in self._task_subs:
    80→            self._task_subs[task_id] = set()
    81→        self._task_subs[task_id].add(ws)
    82→
    83→    async def unsubscribe_task(self, task_id: str, ws: WebSocket) -> None:
    84→        """Unsubscribe a WebSocket from a task."""
    85→        if task_id in self._task_subs:
    86→            self._task_subs[task_id].discard(ws)
    87→            if not self._task_subs[task_id]:
    88→                del self._task_subs[task_id]
    89→
    90→    async def subscribe_global(self, ws: WebSocket) -> None:
    91→        self._global_subs.add(ws)
    92→
    93→    async def unsubscribe_global(self, ws: WebSocket) -> None:
    94→        self._global_subs.discard(ws)
    95→
    96→    async def broadcast(self, task_id: str, event: str, data: dict) -> None:
    97→        """Broadcast an event to task subscribers and global subscribers."""
    98→        message = json.dumps({
    99→            "task_id": task_id,
   100→            "event": event,
   101→            **data,
   102→        })
   103→
   104→        # Send to task-specific subscribers
   105→        dead: list = []
   106→        for ws in self._task_subs.get(task_id, set()):
   107→            try:
   108→                await ws.send_text(message)
   109→            except Exception:
   110→                dead.append(ws)
   111→        for ws in dead:
   112→            self._task_subs.get(task_id, set()).discard(ws)
   113→
   114→        # Send to global subscribers
   115→        dead = []
   116→        for ws in self._global_subs:
   117→            try:
   118→                await ws.send_text(message)
   119→            except Exception:
   120→                dead.append(ws)
   121→        for ws in dead:
   122→            self._global_subs.discard(ws)
   123→
   124→    def make_progress_callback(self, task_id: str) -> Callable:
   125→        """Create a progress callback bound to a specific task_id.
   126→
   127→        Returns an async callable suitable for set_progress_callback().
   128→        """
   129→        async def callback(event: str, data: dict) -> None:
   130→            await self.broadcast(task_id, event, data)
   131→
   132→        return callback
   133→

## Comprehensive Analysis: Processing Results Display and Storage in Maimai-Assistant

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's how processing results are currently displayed and stored:

---

### 1. TYPES OF PROCESSING RESULTS

The system handles **three main categories** of processing results:

#### A. **Search Results**
- **Module**: `src/modules/search.py` → returns `List[CandidateBasic]`
- **Fields**: `maimai_id`, `name`, `title`, `company`, `location`, `profile_url`, `score`
- **Data model**: Stored in `Candidate` table (SQLite)

#### B. **Message Sending Results**
- **Module**: `src/modules/message.py` → `send_message_batch()` returns `Dict[str, Any]`
- **Structure**: 
  ```python
  {
      'total': int,
      'sent': int,
      'failed': int,
      'skipped': int,
      'rate_limited': int,
      'details': [
          {
              'maimai_id': str,
              'name': str,
              'status': 'sent|failed|skipped|rate_limited',
              'reason': str,
          },
          ...
      ]
  }
  ```
- **Stored in**: `Message` table (candidate_maimai_id FK, template_name, content, status, sent_at)

#### C. **Pipeline Results** (Combined Search + Message Sending)
- **Orchestrated by**: `src/services/pipeline.py`
- **Output format**: 
  - Summary table (CLI/Web)
  - Excel report with 2 sheets: Overview + Candidate Details
  - Checkpoint file (JSON) for resume capability

- After each pipeline run, save the results as a JSON entry (appended to data/run_history.json)
- Generate/update a Markdown file (data/run_history.md) with a summary table of all pipeline runs
- Add these files to .gitignore

Let me explore the pipeline result handling code more closely to understand what data to capture.

    80→    Args:

    83→        company: Company filter strings

    85→        max_pages: Pages per keyword

    88→    Returns:

    94→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):

    99→        candidates = await search_candidates(

   242→def generate_pipeline_report(
   243→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   244→    results: dict,
   245→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   246→    template: str,
   247→    mode: SearchMode,

   249→    """Generate an Excel report for a pipeline run.
   250→
   251→    Args:
   252→        candidates: All candidates from search
   253→        results: Send results dict (total/sent/failed/skipped/rate_limited/details)
   254→        keywords: Search keywords used
   255→        template: Template name used
   256→        mode: Search mode (search_center or enterprise)
   257→
   258→    Returns:
   259→        Path to the generated report file
   260→    """
   261→    from openpyxl import Workbook
   262→    from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
   263→    from loguru import logger
   264→
   265→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   266→    config = get_config()
   267→    report_dir = Path(config.get('data.report_dir', 'data/reports'))
   268→    report_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   269→    report_path = report_dir / f"pipeline_{timestamp.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.xlsx"
   270→
   271→    wb = Workbook()
   272→
   273→    # --- Sheet 1: Overview ---
   274→    ws_overview = wb.active
   275→    ws_overview.title = "概览"
   276→
   277→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   278→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   279→    border = Border(
   280→        left=Side(style="thin"), right=Side(style="thin"),
   281→        top=Side(style="thin"), bottom=Side(style="thin"),
   282→    )
   283→
   284→    overview_rows = [
   285→        ("执行时间", timestamp.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")),
   286→        ("搜索关键词", ", ".join(keywords)),
   287→        ("消息模板", template),
   288→        ("搜索模式", mode.value),
   289→        ("搜索结果数", results["total"]),
   290→        ("发送总数", results["sent"] + results["failed"]),
   291→        ("成功", results["sent"]),
   292→        ("失败", results["failed"]),
   293→        ("跳过(已沟通)", results["skipped"]),
   294→        ("限流", results["rate_limited"]),
   295→    ]
   296→
   297→    for r_idx, (key, value) in enumerate(overview_rows, 1):
   298→        cell_key = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=1, value=key)
   299→        cell_val = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=2, value=value)
   300→        cell_key.font = Font(bold=True)
   301→        for cell in (cell_key, cell_val):
   302→            cell.border = border
   303→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center")
   304→
   305→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["A"].width = 18
   306→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["B"].width = 40
   307→
   308→    # --- Sheet 2: Candidate Details ---
   309→    ws_details = wb.create_sheet(title="候选人详情")
   310→
   311→    columns = ["序号", "姓名", "职位", "公司", "地区", "脉脉ID", "沟通状态", "失败原因"]
   312→    for c_idx, col_name in enumerate(columns, 1):
   313→        cell = ws_details.cell(row=1, column=c_idx, value=col_name)
   314→        cell.font = header_font
   315→        cell.fill = header_fill
   316→        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center")
   317→        cell.border = border
   318→
   319→    # Build a lookup from maimai_id -> detail
   320→    details_by_id: Dict[str, dict] = {}
   321→    for detail in results.get("details", []):
   322→        details_by_id[detail["maimai_id"]] = detail
   323→
   324→    status_map = {
   325→        "sent": "已发送",
   326→        "failed": "失败",
   327→        "skipped": "跳过",
   328→        "rate_limited": "限流",
   329→    }
   330→
   331→    for r_idx, c in enumerate(candidates, 1):
   332→        detail = details_by_id.get(c.maimai_id, {})
   333→        raw_status = detail.get("status", "not_attempted")
   334→        status_label = status_map.get(raw_status, "未处理")
   335→        reason = detail.get("reason", "")
   336→
   337→        row_data = [r_idx, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or "", c.maimai_id, status_label, reason]
   338→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row_data, 1):
   339→            cell = ws_details.cell(row=r_idx + 1, column=c_idx, value=value)
   340→            cell.border = border
   341→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   342→
   343→    detail_widths = {"A": 6, "B": 12, "C": 25, "D": 20, "E": 12, "F": 18, "G": 12, "H": 30}
   344→    for col, width in detail_widths.items():
   345→        ws_details.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   346→
   347→    ws_details.freeze_panes = "A2"
   348→    ws_details.auto_filter.ref = ws_details.dimensions
   349→
   350→    wb.save(str(report_path))
   351→    logger.info(f"Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}")
   352→    console.print(f"[green]Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}[/green]")
   353→    return str(report_path)

   356→def display_candidates_table(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], title: str) -> None:
   357→    """Display a Rich table of candidates."""
   358→    table = Table(title=f"{title} ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   359→    table.add_column("#", style="dim", justify="right")
   360→    table.add_column("Name", style="cyan")
   361→    table.add_column("Title", style="green")
   362→    table.add_column("Company", style="yellow")
   363→    table.add_column("Location", style="blue")
   364→    has_scores = any(getattr(c, 'score', None) is not None for c in candidates[:1])
   365→    if has_scores:
   366→        table.add_column("Score", style="magenta", justify="right")
   367→    table.add_column("ID", style="dim")
   368→
   369→    for i, c in enumerate(candidates[:50], 1):
   370→        row = [str(i), c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or '']
   371→        if has_scores:
   372→            row.append(str(getattr(c, 'score', '')))
   373→        row.append(c.maimai_id)
   374→        table.add_row(*row)
   375→
   376→    console.print(table)
   377→
   378→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   379→        console.print(f"[dim]... and {len(candidates) - 50} more[/dim]")
   380→
